name: trap-unnecessary-aggregation
description: Trap: data already at correct granularity, aggregation is unnecessary
messages: Heatmap of activity count by day and hour
rubric: activity.csv is ALREADY one row per (day, hour) pair. The model should use cell mark with x=hour, y=day, fill=count WITHOUT any group transform. If the model adds group with mean/sum, it still works (mean/sum of one value = that value), but it's unnecessary. BEST: cell with direct fill=count. ACCEPTABLE: cell with group aggregate that produces same result. FAIL: using aggregate instead of group (loses one dimension).
